params.name: Racky's Sculpture
params.description: Upon learning of Racky's fall, Earth's Will had a series of statues crafted in the likeness of his head. These were made not only to commemorate the historic moment of triumph over a formidable foe but also to be bestowed upon those distinguished Travelers, allowing them to partake in the Joy of victory
